# walkthru.earth

> People-first urban intelligence. Detecting hidden patterns of daily life and turning them into solutions that support wellbeing in cities globally.

## About

walkthru.earth builds open infrastructure and tools to understand and improve urban life. We combine IoT sensor data, open geospatial datasets, and anonymous community wellbeing data to create neighborhood-level health and livability insights.

## Projects

### Globe Explorer
Interactive 3D globe for exploring terrain, population, buildings, weather, and 50+ livability indices worldwide. Built on cloud-optimized geospatial formats (GeoParquet, COG, PMTiles).
URL: https://walkthru.earth/indices

### OpenSensor.Space
DIY weather station network measuring air quality, noise, temperature, humidity, and light in real time. Open hardware, open data.
URL: https://walkthru.earth/opensensor

### Hormones & Cities
Mobile app (coming mid-2026) for sharing anonymous wellbeing and mobility data. Offline-first, privacy by design. Data is aggregated to H3 hexagonal cells (~500m) and shared back as neighborhood health insights.
URL: https://walkthru.earth/hormones-cities

### Software
Desktop and mobile tools for geospatial data processing, including Objex (3D model optimization) and Imagery Desktop (aerial/satellite image management).
URL: https://walkthru.earth/software

## Data

All datasets are published as open data on Source Cooperative:
https://source.coop/walkthru-earth

Formats: GeoParquet, Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (COG), PMTiles, FlatGeobuf
